query:
SELECT
                    `i`.`id`,
                    `counts`.`first`,
                    `counts`.`last`,
                    COALESCE(`counts`.`count`, 0) as `count!: i64`
                FROM `Item` `i`
                LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT
                        `o`.`item_id` AS `id`,
                        MIN(`c`.`id`) as `first`,
                        MAX(`c`.`id`) as `last`,
                        COUNT(`c`.`id`) as `count`
                    FROM `Occurrence` `o`
                    JOIN `Comic` `c` ON `c`.`id` = `o`.`comic_id`
                        AND (? is NULL OR `c`.`is_guest_comic` = ?)
                        AND (? is NULL OR `c`.`is_non_canon` = ?)
                        AND NOT `c`.`hidden`
                    GROUP BY `o`.`item_id`
                ) `counts` ON `counts`.`id` = `i`.`id`
                ORDER BY `count` DESC
